author: l6vc
content:
Completed the test audit + hardening pass. Summary:

## Tests added (adversarial, with teeth)

### ripsed-core/src/engine.rs — property-based invariants
- prop_change_lines_ascending_and_in_bounds: every change.line is 1-indexed and strictly ascending
- prop_delete_exact_line_count: Delete removes exactly the matching line count — found a real engine bug on 'delete every line' (produced '\n' instead of '')
- prop_crlf_majority_preserved: CRLF-heavy input stays CRLF after Replace
- prop_replace_change_count_matches_containing_lines: change vec size == matching-line count
- prop_no_trailing_newline_preserved: input without trailing newline stays without

### ripsed-core/src/engine.rs — concrete line-number invariants
- test_line_numbers_with_mixed_line_endings
- test_line_number_for_single_line_no_newline
- test_first_line_is_one_not_zero
- test_delete_reports_original_line_number
- test_delete_all_lines_produces_empty_file (+ CRLF variant)

### ripsed-core/src/matcher.rs — pathological pattern handling + proptest
- test_literal_dollar_one_pattern (regression guard for regex/literal confusion)
- test_regex_backreferences_work_in_replace
- test_regex_no_catastrophic_backtracking (ReDoS protection locked in)
- test_replacement_with_control_chars
- test_empty_regex_match_does_not_panic
- prop_literal_matches_iff_contains
- prop_replace_none_iff_not_match
- prop_replace_with_self_is_identity
- prop_case_insensitive_ascii_symmetric

### ripsed-core/src/undo.rs — edge cases with teeth
- pop_zero_is_noop, pop_exceeds_length_drains_all, pop_returns_newest_first
- prune_drops_oldest_not_newest
- from_jsonl_skips_malformed_lines, from_jsonl_tolerates_blank_and_crlf_lines
- empty_log_jsonl_is_empty_string
- pop_actually_removes_from_log

### ripsed-fs/src/writer.rs — real rollback + permission preservation
- atomic_batch_commit_mid_failure_restores_originals: forces failure via replacing-file-onto-directory
- atomic_batch_rollback_removes_files_that_didnt_exist_before
- write_atomic_preserves_unix_permissions (Unix)
- write_atomic_failure_leaves_no_temp_file (Unix)
- write_atomic_preserves_embedded_nul_bytes

### ripsed-fs/src/discovery.rs — symlink safety + ordering determinism
- symlink_outside_root_not_followed_by_default: security invariant
- symlink_alias_currently_duplicates_discovery: documents an existing bug
- parallel_discovery_order_is_deterministic
- large_binary_file_is_filtered_without_full_read

### ripsed/tests/concurrent_write_test.rs — NEW file, 4 integration tests
- concurrent_distinct_replacements_all_land (found real lock race bug!)
- concurrent_idempotent_replacement_is_safe
- concurrent_dry_runs_never_modify (guards 0.2.7 dry-run lock skip)
- concurrent_readers_and_writers_do_not_corrupt

## Real bugs surfaced and fixed

### 1. FileLock mutual exclusion race (ripsed-fs/src/lock.rs)
Between 'O_CREAT|O_EXCL' creating the lock file and 'writeln!(pid)' populating it, there was a window where another thread's 'is_lock_stale' saw an empty file, declared it stale, removed it, and created its own. Two concurrent holders of the 'lock' = silent lost writes. FIX: treat empty/garbled lock files as live (not stale) within a 5-second grace period; only reap if older. Stress-tested 30/30 runs clean.

### 2. Engine trailing-newline bug (ripsed-core/src/engine.rs)
Deleting the only line of a one-line file produced '\n' instead of ''. FIX: skip trailing-newline preservation when the result is empty.

### 3. Documented (not fixed): symlink inode dedup in discovery
When two paths in the discovered set canonicalize to the same inode (via symlink), they are both returned. Under per-path locking, they'd acquire different '.ripsed.lock' files for the same underlying file and race. Test pins the current behavior so a future fix tightens.

## Tests removed (tautological)
~20 serde-roundtrip and accessor-over-field tests from operation.rs, error.rs, schema.rs, request.rs. Kept the wire-format assertion tests (they lock in the public JSON protocol) and replaced the roundtrip tests with specific default-value and unknown-variant-handling assertions.

## Stats
- Before: 495 tests passing
- After: 549 tests passing (+54 net), 0 failing
- Clippy: clean with -D warnings
- Concurrent stress: 30/30 runs pass after lock fix
